# Oak Real Estate Partners
> Oak Real Estate Partners is a national balance sheet lender providing commercial real estate lending and investment solutions — including bridge loans, HUD financing, and private credit opportunities designed for institutional-caliber partners.
Oak Real Estate Partners delivers commercial real estate finance and investment across both debt and equity capital. The firm's alternative investment platform is built around lending strategies engineered specifically for alternative assets and structured to align with institutional investment objectives. The team has sponsored numerous institutionally backed investment vehicles, deploying more than $10 billion in debt and equity transactions, and operates alongside affiliated entities including Red Oak Capital Holdings and Johnson Capital Multifamily.
Core focus areas (from site meta): commercial real estate, bridge loans, HUD financing, private credit, real estate investment, and commercial lending.
## Main Pages
- [Home](https://oakrepartners.com/): Overview of Oak's commercial real estate lending and investment platform — bridge loans, HUD financing, and private credit for institutional partners.
- [Transaction Portfolio](https://oakrepartners.com/transactions): Track record of commercial real estate loans reflecting disciplined underwriting and strategic asset selection, with a focus on capital preservation and risk-adjusted returns. Includes transactions from Oak and affiliated entities.
- [Oak Institutional Credit Solutions](https://oakrepartners.com/oak-institutional-credit-solutions): Institutional investment offering for non-ERISA accounts (foundations, endowments, insurance, trust, and taxable accounts).
- [Oak Parallel Bridge Credit Fund](https://oakrepartners.com/oak-parallel-bridge-credit-fund): Institutional investment offering for ERISA accounts (public and corporate pension plans, IRAs, and qualified accounts).
## Solutions & Keywords
- Commercial real estate lending — national balance sheet lender delivering CRE debt and equity capital solutions.
- Bridge loans — short-term, structured financing for the acquisition, refinance, repositioning, and stabilization of transitional commercial real estate assets.
- HUD financing — long-term, government-backed (FHA/HUD-insured) financing for multifamily, affordable housing, senior living, and healthcare properties, offered through affiliated Johnson Capital Multifamily.
- Private credit — alternative-asset lending strategies in the lower/small-balance segment, built for institutional-caliber partners.
- Real estate investment — debt and equity capital solutions originated for CRE investments by an experienced team of financing experts.
## Optional
- [Red Oak Capital Holdings](https://www.redoakcapitalholdings.com/): Affiliated structured-finance platform providing short-term bridge loans and HUD takeout financing for commercial real estate.
